commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary | 2026-07-14

Nasdaq 100 dominates with exceptional liquidity metrics (ILLIQ=0.0025, spread=0.7196%), significantly outpacing NYSE despite marginally wider spreads. The liquidity gap widens sharply beyond top-three venues, with Korea Exchange ranking fifth but exhibiting substantially elevated illiquidity (0.1298) and spreads (1.3338%), suggesting structural disadvantages or lower institutional participation. European exchanges cluster competitively mid-range, while SIX Swiss Exchange notably achieves tightest spreads (0.5027%) despite moderate illiquidity metrics.
